sections.paragraph:
- Original: διανύω

- Transliteration: Dianuo

- Phonetic: dee-an-oo'-o

- Definition:

1. to accomplish fully, bring quite to an end, finish

- Origin: from G1223 and anuo (to effect)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and ἀνύω anuō (to effect); to accomplish thoroughly: - finish.
